no: The Artisan's House Tweaks - Item Changes

conflicts.reason: HT cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) and IWDification cn:70 (IWD Shapeshifting) both overhaul druid wild shape — modify CLABDR01/04 and shapeshifting spells. Choose one. HT cn:2 IS selected, IWDification cn:70 No conflict. Note: original entry incorrectly listed IWDification cn:130 (Damage Animations) which is unrelated.
conflicts.source: Both modify CLABDR01/04 + shapeshifting spells; cn:130 is damage animations (corrected), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Only shapeshifting overlaps. HT cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) and AK cn:5100 (Shapeshifter Overhaul) both modify CLABDR04.2DA — install HT before AK. HT cn:4 (Rebalanced Proficiencies) HT cn:5 (Rebalanced Weapon Styles) modifies WEAPPROF rows 28-31; AK fighter kits use ADD_KIT_EX which writes kit-specific columns only — no overlap, safe.
conflicts.source: HT wildshape.tpa line 83 COPY_EXISTING CLABDR04; AK Shapeshifter.tpa modifies CLABDR04 via kit creation; AK fighter kits use ADD_KIT_EX (different columns), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both mods revise weapon fighting styles. Use one or the other.

Install order dependent — install HT before ToF. (1) HT cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) directly edits CLABDR01/04.2DA; ToF cn:40600 uses abstract kit.edit on druid shapeshifting. ToF applies on top of HT if installed after. (2) HT cn:5 (Weapon Styles) copies STYLBONU.2DA and modifies WEAPPROF rows 28-31; ToF cn:81200 also copies STYLBONU.2DA (last wins) and ToF cn:81100 wipes WEAPPROF to Lua (captures HT values first if HT installed before). (3) HT cn:3 (Racial Bonuses) modifies ABRACEAD.2DA; ToF cn:20000 does NOT touch this file — no overlap. (4) HT cn:4 (Proficiencies) modifies WEAPPROF globally — same ToF cn:81100 Lua externalization issue. HT cn:3/4
conflicts.myComps: #2 Expanded Shapeshifting (IN) #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles (IN) #3 Racial Bonuses (NOT) #4 Proficiencies (NOT)
conflicts.theirComps: #40600 Druid shapeshift #81100 Weapon Proficiency #81200 Weapon Styles #20000 Subraces (no overlap) #80000 Ability Scores (no overlap)
conflicts.source: HT wildshape.tpa edits CLABDR01/04; ToF uses kit.edit; HT stylebonus copies STYLBONU; ToF style copies same; HT WEAPPROF rows captured by ToF Lua if HT first, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: HT's proficiency and weapon style components overlap with cdtweaks' weapon proficiency system
conflicts.myComps: #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles #6 Racial Weapon Proficiency #7 Rebalanced APR
conflicts.theirComps: #2060 Weapon Styles for All #2160 #2161 #2162 #2163 #2164 Weapon Proficiency #2440 Bonus APR

conflicts.reason: Install order note. HT cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) replaces druid shapeshifting spells in CLABDR01/04. SCS cn:2040/4030 (Improved Shapeshifting) applies AI script improvements to shapeshift forms. SCS installs after HT and applies on top. Install HT before SCS.
conflicts.source: HT replaces shapeshift spells in CLABs; SCS adds AI scripts to forms; SCS installs after in TACTICAL category, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: HT's Expanded Shapeshifting overlaps with jtweaks' Shapeshift corrections
Both modify mxsplwis.2da WIS bonus spell table. Use one or the other
Both modify racial stat bonuses. Avoid mixing
conflicts.theirComps: #100 Ability Score #110 Bonus Spell Slots #121 #122 5E Caster Bonus

conflicts.reason: HT cn:4/5/7 proficiency and style components overlap with M&G kits. M&G only has cn:105/110 (mage/thief kits) and cn:210 (movement) — no fighter/ranger overlap with HT.
conflicts.myComps: #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles #7 Rebalanced APR
conflicts.theirComps: #50-#165 Kit components #220 Ranger Spell Table (mostly NOT in preset)

conflicts.reason: Both modify proficiencies, weapon styles, and HLAs
conflicts.myComps: #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles #7 Rebalanced APR

conflicts.reason: HT cn:34 changes trap detection probability to 100% (check once per round). ET cn:100 modifies trap detection/removal difficulty VALUES in specific areas. ET cn:200 adds new settable trap spells. Different aspects — HT changes the detection formula, ET changes the area difficulty numbers and adds new traps. Can coexist. Install HT before ET.
conflicts.source: HT modifies detection formula; ET modifies .ARE trap values and adds new .SPL traps; different mechanisms, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both modify mxsplwis.2da (WIS bonus spell table). HT cn:12 adds INT/WIS/CHA-based bonus slots. ZG cn:100 uses a mixed PnP-BG table. Last installed wins. Install HT before ZG if using both.
conflicts.source: Both COPY to mxsplwis.2da; original note had wrong cn:7 (APR, unrelated), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both overwrite mxsplwis.2da (WIS bonus spell table). Last installed wins.

sum: Collection of house-rule tweaks covering expanded racial enemies, improved druid shapeshifting, revised racial bonuses, and other gameplay changes.

7.desc: Rebalanced APR progression from weapon proficiency

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Expanded Racial Enemies
co.no: Expands the list of available racial enemies for rangers.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Expanded Shapeshifting
co.no: Complements AK's Shapeshifter. Don't mix with ToF, SCS, or jtweaks' shapeshifting changes

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Expanded Racial Bonuses
co.no: Avoid mixing with mods touching races and stats (ToF's subraces, SD Stat Overhauls)

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Rebalanced Proficiencies
co.no: Generally incompatible with other proficiency changes (cdtweaks, ToF, M&G)

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Rebalanced Weapon Styles
co.no: Rebalances weapon fighting style bonuses (two-handed, sword-and-shield, etc.).

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Racial Weapon Proficiency
co.no: Should go after cdtweaks' Styles for All. Check interaction with ToF's subraces

co.n: House Tweaks: Rebalanced Attacks Per Round Progression
co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Rebalanced Attacks Per Round Progression
co.no: Rebalances APR progression from weapon proficiency levels.

co.tp2n: Backstab from any direction
co.no: Backstab tweaks variant. Part of Monk/Backstab subcomponent group.

co.tp2n: Backstab from any direction + Backstab from out of stealth at -2 modifier when attacking from behind

co.n: Constitution Bonuses for All Classes + Regeneration Changes
co.tp2n: Constitution Bonuses for All Classes + Regeneration Changes
co.no: ToF also does it. Artemius warns from using this due to animation wonkyness v Increased CON bonuses bonus increase every 1 CON point until 18, then every 2, until +7 for warrior (faster) and others (s

co.tp2n: Regeneration Changes Only

co.n: Constitution Bonuses for All Classes Only
co.tp2n: Constitution Bonuses for All Classes Only

co.n: House Tweaks: INT/WIS/CHA-based Bonus Spell Slots
co.tp2n: House Tweaks: INT/WIS/CHA-based Bonus Spell Slots
co.no: Bonus spell slots based on INT (arcane), WIS (divine), and CHA (bard/sorcerer). Overwrites mxsplwis.2da.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Warrior HLAs
co.no: Arcane casters and shaman start at lv17 (wizard INT, sorc/bard/shaman CHA), divine casters (Ranger/paladin) start at lv14 (WIS) Incompatible with ToF's Revised ability score modifiers and SubtleD's St

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Improved Dialogues (BG:EE)
co.no: Adds improved dialogue options for BG1 NPCs and quests. BGEE/EET only.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Not-So-Indestructible Rats
co.no: Rats in Candlekeep and other areas can actually be killed.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Good-Aligned Roleplay Rewards (BG2:EE)
co.no: . mod_installer: ACTION_READLN prompt asks about Female Dwarves — requires manual input (1=Yes, 2=No)

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for Female Dwarves choice (1=Yes, 2=No). Requires manual input.

co.n: House Tweaks: Cloak of Dragomir only decreases stats in daylight
co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Cloak of Dragomir only decreases stats in daylight

co.n: House Tweaks: Give Stat Bonuses to EENPCs in BG2 (except Hexxat)

co.no: BG2EE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~bg2ee~ (NOT eet). Will fail on EET.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Useful Plot Items
co.no: BG2EE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~bg2ee~ (NOT eet). Will fail on EET.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Faster Troll Unconsciousness
co.no: already installed earlier among item mods

co.no: BG2EE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~bg2ee~ (NOT eet). Will fail on EET. Restores reputation increase sound.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Race Text Patch
House Tweaks: Hoodless Thief Avatars
co.no: to achieve its goal, it adds a lot of races to racetext.2da so you can see them referenced in the character info page this seems to cause a lot more work for ToF's subraces if installed before it?. mod_installer: ACTION_READLN prompt asks about Female Dwarves — requires manual input (1=Yes, 2=No)

co.no: Adjusts thief weapon proficiencies.

co.tp2n: House Tweaks: Ankheg and Dragonscale Armor Count as Medium Armor
co.no: Makes non-metal armors usable by bards and barbarians.

co.no: Modifies Turn Undead mechanics.

co.no: Changes trap activation behavior.

co.n: Set Traps in Enemy Range: No restrictions
co.tp2n: No restrictions
co.no: Allows setting traps in enemy range with no restrictions.

co.n: Thief Stronghold Tweak: Ask Jariel to pay quota
co.tp2n: Thief Stronghold Tweak: Ask Jariel to pay your quota in your stead
